full_text:
Cao Gan 曹幹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Gan (曹幹). Sternly warned by Cao Rui not to meet with guests lest he be compromised. Cao Gan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Gan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
